notes: Committed V1 panels are used for plausibility screening only, not biological validation.
Hallmark files are small V1 subsets derived from MSigDB Hallmark concepts; they are not a full MSigDB redistribution.
Lineage files are project-curated K562/hematopoietic/leukemia plausibility panels for MVP reporting.

panels.name: hallmark_apoptosis
panels.source: MSigDB Hallmark Apoptosis concept, V1 curated subset

panels.name: hallmark_e2f_targets
panels.source: MSigDB Hallmark E2F Targets concept, V1 curated subset

panels.name: hallmark_g2m_checkpoint
panels.source: MSigDB Hallmark G2M Checkpoint concept, V1 curated subset

panels.name: hallmark_myc_targets_v1
panels.source: MSigDB Hallmark MYC Targets V1 concept, V1 curated subset

panels.name: hallmark_tnfa_signaling_via_nfkb
panels.source: MSigDB Hallmark TNFA Signaling via NFKB concept, V1 curated subset

panels.name: k562_erythroid_lineage
panels.source: Project-curated K562 erythroid lineage plausibility panel
